user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new employee verification, so that required background or credential checks are defined
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Verification screen; When I click Add new employee verification and enter a verification name and applicability; Then the verification is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to mark a verification as recurring and set where it applies, so that periodic checks run for the right employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating a verification; When I set it as recurring and choose the applicable at value; Then the verification is stored with those settings

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view all verifications with name, applicable at, recurring flag and applicability, so that I can review the verification setup
acceptance_criteria: Given verifications exist; When I open the list; Then each row shows Verification name, Applicable at, Recurring verification and Applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the verification list, so that I see the current set of verifications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Employee Verification screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads
